summary: Cashfree payment gateway integration testing completed. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Cashfree PRODUCTION environment is correctly configured and all payment checkout endpoints return valid Cashfree checkout URLs.
critical_code_review_comments: Cashfree SDK is using InsecureRequestWarning for HTTPS requests - consider adding SSL certificate verification in production
The cashfree_service.py correctly handles PRODUCTION vs SANDBOX environment switching
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed data created during tests (packers bookings, advertiser profiles, advertisements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cashfree payment integration fully tested. All payment endpoints working: 1) /api/payments/checkout for visit packages (single_visit ₹200, three_visits ₹350, five_visits ₹500, property_lock ₹999), 2) /api/packers/pay for packers bookings, 3) /api/advertising/pay for advertising. All checkout URLs redirect to Cashfree PRODUCTION (payments.cashfree.com). Payment status check at /api/payments/status/{order_id} working. Webhook endpoint at /api/webhook/cashfree accepting POST requests.

features_tested.single_visit_checkout: PASS - ₹200 package creates valid Cashfree order
features_tested.three_visits_checkout: PASS - ₹350 package creates valid Cashfree order
features_tested.five_visits_checkout: PASS - ₹500 package creates valid Cashfree order
features_tested.property_lock_checkout: PASS - ₹999 package creates valid Cashfree order
features_tested.packers_packages_api: PASS - Returns 5 packages (basic, standard, premium, elite, intercity)
features_tested.packers_booking_creation: PASS - Creates booking with pending status
features_tested.packers_payment_initiation: PASS - Returns valid Cashfree checkout URL
features_tested.advertising_packages_api: PASS - Returns 4 packages (starter, growth, premium, elite)
features_tested.advertisement_creation: PASS - Creates ad with pending status
features_tested.advertising_payment_initiation: PASS - Returns valid Cashfree checkout URL
features_tested.payment_status_check: PASS - Returns transaction status for valid order_id
features_tested.webhook_endpoint: PASS - Accepts POST requests and returns success
